findings.finding: T-001's Done When item 'The focused suite and the relevant repository gate pass.' names no concrete verification command or artifact: 'the focused suite' is not identified by path and 'the relevant repository gate' does not say WHICH gate - design.md's Test Strategy lists at least four distinct candidates (full check-workflow-state repo-wide run, workflow-state-parity, workflow-state-ci-integration, workflow-state-registry), so an implementer cannot determine which command's output proves this item complete. The other 8 Done When items are concrete.
